title: sebastiania glandulosa var. parvifolia
intro: Sebastiania glandulosa var. parvifolia, also known as the small-leaved Sebastiania, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Sebastiania glandulosa var. parvifolia is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal benefits, making it a valuable natural remedy in folk medicine.
